nodes.label: kalkulator-kalkmate-kamera-odkryta.png
nodes.description: Product photograph showing the back side of the KalkMate calculator enclosure on a white background. The black plastic housing is visible with two screws at the top corners, two rubber feet at the bottom corners, and a recessed rectangular cutout in the lower-center area exposing the camera module aperture (small circular camera lens visible inside the cutout). Top of the device shows the tapered upper section of the case.
